'''dhawowo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:yolkiness|yolkiness]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-w-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yolkiness|yolkiness]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| dhawowo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhæweweth|dhæweweth]] || [[word:dhæwewej|dhæwewej]] || [[word:dhæwewesh|dhæwewesh]] || [[word:dhæwewe|dhæwewe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhawowowoth|dhawowowoth]] || [[word:dhawowowoj|dhawowowoj]] || [[word:dhawowowosh|dhawowowosh]] || [[word:dhawowowo|dhawowowo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhawowoth|dhawowoth]] || [[word:dhawowoj|dhawowoj]] || [[word:dhawowosh|dhawowosh]] || [[word:dhawowo|dhawowo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhawofwoth|dhawofwoth]] || [[word:dhawofwoj|dhawofwoj]] || [[word:dhawofwosh|dhawofwosh]] || [[word:dhawofwof|dhawofwof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhawowotho|dhawowotho]] || [[word:dhawowojo|dhawowojo]] || [[word:dhawowosho|dhawowosho]] || [[word:dhawowoko|dhawowoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhawowoth|dhawowoth]] || [[word:dhawowoj|dhawowoj]] || [[word:dhawowosh|dhawowosh]] || [[word:dhawowo|dhawowo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhawowothol|dhawowothol]] || [[word:dhawowojol|dhawowojol]] || [[word:dhawowoshol|dhawowoshol]] || [[word:dhawowokol|dhawowokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhawowothotho|dhawowothotho]] || [[word:dhawowojojo|dhawowojojo]] || [[word:dhawowoshosho|dhawowoshosho]] || [[word:dhawowoko|dhawowoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhawowothon|dhawowothon]] || [[word:dhawowojon|dhawowojon]] || [[word:dhawowoshon|dhawowoshon]] || [[word:dhawowokon|dhawowokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhawowothoro|dhawowothoro]] || [[word:dhawowojoro|dhawowojoro]] || [[word:dhawowoshoro|dhawowoshoro]] || [[word:dhawowokoro|dhawowokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a6f1c69}}
